name: Minted Butter Beans
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons fresh mint or 1 teaspoon dried mint
recipeInstructions:
1. In a pan, sauté the onions and garlic in some of the vegetable stock until they begin to soften.
2. Add the chopped tomatoes, cooked butter beans, and mint (fresh or dried). Season with salt and pepper to taste.
3. Pour in the remaining vegetable stock and stir gently.
4. Cover the pan and simmer for about 20 minutes, allowing the flavors to meld together.
5. Serve as a main dish alongside wholemeal bread rolls and a green salad.
This recipe is suitable for a vegetarian supper plate.
